description: This API routine returns the bus number and section number corresponding to the specified position in the ordered list (numeric or alphabetic) of non-star point buses (i.e., star point buses are excluded). Dummy buses of multi-section lines are included; hidden star point buses of three-winding transformers are not included; topological buses of buses represented by multiple bus sections are included. This API routine was first introduced in release 34.1.0. ierr, ibus, isect = ordbussect(iord)

parameters.name: iord
parameters.description: Ordinal position; 1 through the number of non-star point buses in the working case. (input).

return_values.name: isect
return_values.description: Section number; isect is returned as 0 if bus ibus is not represented by multiple bus sections. (output).

error_codes.description: ‘IORD’ outside of range 1 through the number of non-start point buses in the working case; ‘IBUS’ and ‘ISECT’ unchanged.
